an3.107:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, (1) in the Noble One's discipline, singing is wailing. (2) In the Noble One's discipline, dancing is madness. (3) In the Noble One's discipline, to laugh excessively, displaying one's teeth, is childishness. Therefore, bhikkhus, in regard to singing and dancing
the demolition of the bridge. When you smile rejoicing in the Dhamma, you may simply show a smile."
